title: spiranthes quadridentata
intro: Spiranthes quadridentata, also known as the narrow-leaved ladies' tresses, is a type of perennial orchid native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the roots of Spiranthes quadridentata can be dried and used in teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
